expectations.text: Uses hsl() color notation for CSS color values
expectations.evidence: 0 hsl() uses; 29 hex color values — baseline defaults to hex (#94a3b8, #0f172a, etc.)

expectations.text: Applies at least two distinct font-weight values (heavier for value, lighter for label)
expectations.evidence: Three font-weight values: 500, 600, 700 — good hierarchy present

expectations.text: The metric value uses a visibly larger font-size than the label text
expectations.evidence: 6 distinct font sizes used; metric number is the largest element per visual inspection

expectations.text: Secondary text (label, metadata) uses a muted/lighter color distinct from primary value
expectations.evidence: card-label uses color: #94a3b8 (light grey-blue) vs primary value color: #0f172a (near-black)
